subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto her who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and hath turned unto her Lord when He came [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی التی آمنت بالله المهیمن القیوم و ارادت مولیها اذ اتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
